questionHtml: Calculate the Gibbs free energy change, ΔG⦵, in kJ mol−1, for the reaction at 298 K. Use section 1 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml: «ΔG⦵ = 53.0 kJ mol–1 – (298K × 0.1665 kJ K–1 mol–1) =» 3.4 «kJ mol–1» ✔

meta.title: Calculate the Gibbs free energy change, ΔG⦵, in kJ mol−1, for the reaction at 298 K. Use section 1 of the data booklet.
